headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on MarketAxess Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $129
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $195 to $129.
